# dead-code-hunter Architecture Docs

## Entitys
- [DeadCodeAnalysis Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-deadcodeanalysis.html): Core logic for processing and filtering dead code candidates retrieved from the analysis API. Architectural overview of the DeadCodeAnalysis domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [GitHubAction Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-githubaction.html): The primary entry point and integration layer that handles the GitHub workflow environment and orchestration. Architectural overview of the GitHubAction domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 5 source files.
- [InputHandling — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-inputhandling.html): Parses and validates configuration parameters from action.yml Architecture documentation for the InputHandling subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [Markdown Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-markdown.html): Utility domain for transforming raw analysis data into GitHub-flavored Markdown. Architectural overview of the Markdown domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [OutputReporting — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/subdomain-outputreporting.html): Manages communication back to the GitHub PR UI Architecture documentation for the OutputReporting subdomain (part of GitHubAction domain) in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [SupermodelSDK Domain — dead-code-hunter Architecture](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/domain-supermodelsdk.html): External integration domain for interfacing with the Supermodel static analysis engine. Architectural overview of the SupermodelSDK domain in the dead-code-hunter codebase. Contains 0 source files.
- [createZipArchive() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-index-ts-createziparchive.html): Architecture documentation for the createZipArchive() function in index.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [dead-code.test.ts — dead-code-hunter Source File](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/file-src-tests-dead-code-test-ts.html): Architecture documentation for dead-code.test.ts, a typescript file in the dead-code-hunter codebase.

- [escapeTableCell() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-markdown-ts-escapetablecell.html): Architecture documentation for the escapeTableCell() function in markdown.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
- [filterByChangedFiles() — dead-code-hunter Function Reference](https://repos.supermodeltools.com/dead-code-hunter/fn-dead-code-ts-filterbychangedfiles.html): Architecture documentation for the filterByChangedFiles() function in dead-code.ts from the dead-code-hunter codebase.
